type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Distance travelled on unpaved roads was less than 10,000 km. Therefore, PM emissions from road dust are not included in total PM emissions. Amount of soil cover stored in 2022 is less than amount in 2021. Therefore, PM emissions from storage piles in 2022 are less than 2021.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Distance travelled on unpaved roads was less than 10,000 km. Therefore, PM emissions from road dust are not included in total PM emissions. Amount of soil cover stored in 2022 is less than amount in 2021. Therefore, PM emissions from storage piles in 2022 are less than 2021.
